roa.docketEntryComment: NOTC MO TO DISCOVER

CONT 1/9/95 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL;DEFT MO NO MENTION GANGS GRTDDEF MO NOT MENTION PRS PROB OR NEW ARRESTS GRTD;MO SEP BAO TRUONG DENMO TO IMPEACH DEN;MOS EXCL ASIAN SPEAKING WITS DEN

CONT 1/10/95 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
TRANSF TO D25 FOR TRIAL F/W

VTN INT SW-PHAM/H;CONT 1/5/95 AT 815AM IN S25 FOR FUR PTC
VTN INT SW-H/PHAM;CONT 1/5/95 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22(PTC IN D25)
CONT TO 010395 FOR TRIAL
TRANSF TO D22 F/W FOR TRIAL
TRANSF F/W S24 FOR PTC;CONT TO 110294 FOR TRIAL
VTN INT SW-PHAM/H;DEEMED PRETRIED
